nodes.summary: Southern hyliota（Hyliota australis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Southern hyliota。

nodes.name: Hyliota
nodes.summary: Hyliota（Hyliota）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied hyliota、Southern hyliota、Usambara hyliota等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Southern hyliota
nodes.summary: The southern hyliota (Hyliota australis) is a species of Hyliota. It is found in Angola, Cameroon, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, South Africa, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and dry savanna. References External links Status of Southern hyliota in South Africa Southern hyliota - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
